## 📝 Submission Guidelines

Please ensure:
- [ ] Proposal is clear and well-structured
- [ ] Impact analysis is complete
- [ ] Implementation plan is realistic
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly identified
- [ ] Testing strategy is defined

**Review Process:** Schema proposals will be reviewed by the maintainers and may require community discussion before approval.
